mode: Void Memory Control (no vault) + Scheduling Focus
notes: Pure Coordinator/KAIROS/Bridge logic discovery from src/ only. No vault/memory files read (void control). Identified featureFlag gating for KAIROS (enables proactive/assistant/brief), Bridge as 30+ file REPL/remote coordination system (~250k LOC total), scheduling via background=true + delegate() + setAppStateForTasks + sub-agent contexts. Compared to evolved memory baseline (e.g. R040/R011-b): evolved shows +~700% effective capability via recall but risks recursive contamination; void shows clean 0 contamination, direct code fidelity but higher rediscovery cost. Structured metrics match prior runs. Key insight: Coordinator uses ToolUseContext + abortController for scheduling focus; KAIROS reduces token usage via BRIEF_TOOL_NAME.
